infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to report incidents in your area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs your location to alert you about nearby incidents.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to capture photos of incidents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs photo library access to upload images of incidents.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Ngumu's Eye to use your location to report and receive alerts about nearby incidents.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Ngumu's Eye to access your photos to upload incident images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Ngumu's Eye to access your camera to capture incident photos.
